mapper.select:
SELECT -- 今日交易总额（使用范围查询） COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_time >= CURDATE() AND trans_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN amount END), 0) AS todayTradeAmount,
-- 昨日交易总额 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND trans_time < CURDATE() THEN amount END), 0) AS yesterdayTradeAmount,
-- 今日贷款总额 COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM loan_record WHERE loan_date >= CURDATE() AND loan_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)), 0) AS todayLoanAmount,
-- 昨日贷款总额 COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM loan_record WHERE loan_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND loan_date < CURDATE()), 0) AS yesterdayLoanAmount,
-- 今日新增客户 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE open_date >= CURDATE() AND open_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS todayNewCustomers,
-- 昨日新增客户 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE open_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND open_date < CURDATE()) AS yesterdayNewCustomers,
-- 今日还款总额 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_time >= CURDATE() AND trans_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND trans_type = 'REPAYMENT' THEN amount END), 0) AS todayRepaymentAmount,
-- 昨日还款总额 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND trans_time < CURDATE() AND trans_type = 'REPAYMENT' THEN amount END), 0) AS yesterdayRepaymentAmount
FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) -- 只需扫描昨天+今天 AND trans_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT b.branch_name AS branchName, COALESCE(SUM(tl.amount),0) AS tradeAmount FROM branch b LEFT JOIN customer c ON b.id = c.branch_id LEFT JOIN trans_log tl ON c.customer_no = tl.customer_no AND tl.status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY b.id, b.branch_name ORDER BY tradeAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT `month`, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS profit FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(trans_time, '%Y-%m') AS `month`, fee AS amount FROM trans_log WHERE trans_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) AND status = 'SUCCESS' UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(loan_date, '%Y-%m') AS `month`, maturity_interest AS amount FROM loan_record WHERE loan_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) ) t GROUP BY `month` ORDER BY `month`

SELECT '贷款逾期率' AS name, ROUND(overdue.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.c, 0), 1) AS rate, CONCAT('贷款逾期率 ', ROUND(overdue.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.c, 0), 1), '%') AS content, CASE WHEN ROUND(overdue.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.c, 0), 1) > 5 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ROUND(overdue.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.c, 0), 1) > 2 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS level FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM loan_record WHERE status = 'OVERDUE') overdue CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM loan_record WHERE status IN ('NORMAL','OVERDUE')) total UNION ALL SELECT '贷款不良率' AS name, ROUND(bad.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_l.c, 0), 1) AS rate, CONCAT('贷款不良率 ', ROUND(bad.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_l.c, 0), 1), '%') AS content, CASE WHEN ROUND(bad.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_l.c, 0), 1) > 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ROUND(bad.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_l.c, 0), 1) > 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS level FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM loan_record WHERE status = 'BAD') bad CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM loan_record) all_l UNION ALL SELECT '大额交易占比' AS name, ROUND(large.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_t.c, 0), 1) AS rate, CONCAT('大额交易占比 ', ROUND(large.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_t.c, 0), 1), '%') AS content, CASE WHEN ROUND(large.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_t.c, 0), 1) > 10 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ROUND(large.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_t.c, 0), 1) > 5 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS level FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM trans_log WHERE amount > 100000 AND status = 'SUCCESS') large CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM trans_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') total_t UNION ALL SELECT '交易失败率' AS name, ROUND(fail.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_t.c, 0), 1) AS rate, CONCAT('交易失败率 ', ROUND(fail.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_t.c, 0), 1), '%') AS content, CASE WHEN ROUND(fail.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_t.c, 0), 1) > 5 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ROUND(fail.c * 100.0 / NULLIF(all_t.c, 0), 1) > 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS level FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM trans_log WHERE status != 'SUCCESS') fail CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM trans_log) all_t LIMIT #{limit}
